name: Stir-Fried Kangaroo Strips with Bok Choy #t Chilii Black B
recipeIngredient: 400 g Kangaroo fillet, trimmed and sliced into thin strips
1 tbsp Black beans, washed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim bok choy leaves and slice larger ones in half lengthways, leaving stalks attached.
2. Heat oil in a wok; add shallots, 3/4 of the chillies, 3/4 of garlic, and ginger. Cook for 30 seconds until aromatic.
3. Add brown rice wine and reduce until it thickens.
4. Add black beans, stock, soy sauce, and bring to boil.
5. Cook for five minutes, then turn off heat and set aside.
6. Heat oil in a clean wok; add remaining garlic and chillies, then kangaroo strips.
7. Toss quickly over high heat for a few seconds.
8. Add the warm sauce and bok choy leaves. Cook until leaves are wilted (for one minute).
9. Season with fish sauce and freshly ground black pepper.
10. Pile onto center of plate and serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
